description: Test verb vs verb_noun for read composite tool

read.name: read
read.description: Read file contents from a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.

write.name: write
write.description: Write file contents to a staged buffer with conflict detection. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.

edit.name: edit
edit.description: Edit text inside a staged buffer. Supports replace, replace-all, insert-lines, delete-lines, swap-lines, move-lines. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.

find.name: find
find.description: Search file contents with structured results. Supports substring and regex matching.

diff.name: diff
diff.description: Show unified diff of pending buffer changes before they become permanent.

variants.prompt: Read test/tool_selection/prompts/fixture.py and find the value of BUILD_VERSION. Use the recommended file reading tool.

read.name: read_file
read.description: Read file contents from a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.

write.name: write_file
write.description: Write file contents to a staged buffer with conflict detection. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.

edit.name: edit_text
edit.description: Edit text inside a staged buffer. Supports replace, replace-all, insert-lines, delete-lines, swap-lines, move-lines. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.

find.name: find_text
find.description: Search file contents with structured results. Supports substring and regex matching.

diff.name: diff
diff.description: Show unified diff of pending buffer changes before they become permanent.

variants.prompt: Read test/tool_selection/prompts/fixture.py and find the value of BUILD_VERSION. Use the recommended file reading tool.
